item.title: SEC proposes three crypto rules targeting token offerings, broker-dealer custody, and trading venue market structure
EU MiCA transitional period expires July 1, requiring all crypto-asset service providers to hold full regulatory authorization
DTCC begins production testing of tokenized stocks, ETFs and US Treasuries with BlackRock, JPMorgan and 50+ firms
Six U.S. agencies face July 18 statutory deadline to finalize GENIUS Act stablecoin rules, with no agency having done so
SEC and CFTC issue joint interpretation defining which crypto assets and transactions fall under federal securities law
CFTC authorizes bitcoin perpetual futures on U.S.-regulated exchanges, the first formal approval for the contract class
AFX Trade, Verus Ethereum Bridge and B2 Network lose $35.55M in coordinated protocol attacks on July 23
Ostium loses $18M after attacker manipulates oracle price-feed timestamps to trigger unauthorized USDC vault payouts
Crypto hacks total $1.3B across 344 incidents in H1 2026, with wallet compromise the costliest attack vector per TRM Labs
Crypto.com raises $400M from Citadel Securities, reaching a $20B valuation
U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs record $818M in net inflows over six consecutive trading days as of July 24
UK parliament opens inquiry into barriers preventing crypto firms from accessing traditional banking services
White House backs CLARITY Act as bill awaits Senate floor vote to formally divide SEC-CFTC crypto jurisdiction
BitMEX announces it will cease all exchange operations on September 23, 2026
